body.name: telemetry-to-s3
body.yaml:
filter:
  path: "*"
  content_type: application/cbor
transformers:
  - type: cbor-to-json
steps:
  - destination:
      type: aws-s3
      version: v1
      parameters:
        bucket: golioth-telemetry
        access_key: ${aws_access_key}
        access_secret: ${aws_secret}
        region: us-east-1
